author: Sandpipers
text:
Fold duplicated test init_repo into git_test_support

Seven unit-test modules each stood up a fresh git repo by hand with the same init + identity config (+ usually an empty seed commit), differing only in cosmetic identity strings no test asserts on.

Add init_repo / init_repo_no_commit to git_test_support (the home bl-d1db established for shared git fixture helpers) and route all seven sites through them. human_gate_tests, whose Store::init seeds the first commit itself, uses the no-commit primitive. Drop the store_init variant's --no-verify, a no-op in a hookless tempdir that only obscured intent.
